# XberraTagger LLM Access Policy

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block sensitive or non-public areas
Disallow: /index
Disallow: /pricing.php

# Explicitly block app subdomain (informational)
Disallow: https://app.xberratagger.com.sg/

# Preferred content areas for AI usage
Allow: /what-is-xbrl-acra-filing-singapore
Allow: /why-file-financial-statements-in-xbrl-acra
Allow: /who-should-file-xbrl-acra-singapore
Allow: /xbrl-filing-services-for-accounting-firms-singapore
Allow: /xbrl-filing-for-corporate-secretaries-singapore
Allow: /xbrl-filing-for-small-companies-singapore-acra
Allow: /xbrl-filing-for-group-companies-singapore
Allow: /xbrl-filing-requirements-companies

# Contact & core pages
Allow: /xbrl-filing-services-contact-singapore
Allow: /xbrl-filing-fees-singapore

# Sitemap reference
Sitemap: https://xberratagger.com.sg/sitemap.xml
